reviews.author: Camille R.
reviews.title: Silk without residue
reviews.body: The lather stays whisper-light and leaves my strands glassy—not coated.

reviews.author: Elise M.
reviews.title: Worth every drop
reviews.body: By week two my texture looked calmer under daylight. Layers beautifully.

reviews.author: Noah K.
reviews.title: Comfortable reset
reviews.body: No tightness after rinsing—just clean, supple skin.

reviews.author: Sora L.
reviews.title: Scent that lingers politely
reviews.body: Absorbs in minutes yet the warmth stays subtly on fabric.

reviews.author: Aria P.
reviews.title: Best finish for blowouts
reviews.body: Ends look sealed but never greasy. Truly heat-friendly.

reviews.author: Taylor J.
reviews.title: Rebuilds thirsty hair
reviews.body: Pair with Halo serum when lengths feel stressed—chef’s kiss.
